summary: Phase D — Deterministic Autofill from canonical inventory validated end-to-end. Backend: 16/16 pytest PASS on /app/backend/tests/test_phoneme_phase_d.py. Vowel /ʊ/ GenAm returns 8 features (Height=Near-close, Backness=Back, Rounding=Moderate, Tenseness=Lax, Duration=Short, Voicing=Voiced, Manner=Pure monophthong, Lexical set=FOOT), 4 knobs (advancement/tenseness/height/roundness with height.highlight=true, height.valueLabel='Near-close'), 5+ classification chips (Near-close, Back, Moderate, Lax, Monophthong), vowelChartPosition={x:95,y:22}, source.canonical_kind='vowel', source.lexical_set='FOOT'. Vowel /iː/ RP: Height='Close', vowelChartPosition.y=5, lexical_set='FLEECE'. Consonant /t/ GenAm: Voicing=Voiceless, Place=Alveolar, Manner=Plosive, knobs=[], classification=3, vowelChartPosition={}, source.canonical_kind='consonant', source.dialect_notes contains 'flap' (dict shape with 'flapped' key). Diphthong /ɪə/ RP: canonical_kind='diphthong', classification contains 'Diphthong'; same ipa on GenAm returns 404 (RP-only). Error cases: unknown IPA 'X' → 404 with detail 'non presente'; dialect='Italian' → 400 with 'GenAm o RP'; empty ipa → 422; no auth → 403. Persistence: GET /api/phonemes/u-foot before/after autofill returns identical features & knobs (preview-only confirmed). Regression: GET /api/canonical/phonemes count==84, GET /api/phonemes/u-foot returns 9-bar canonical frequencyChart intact. Frontend: /admin/phonemes/u-foot editor loads, 'Autofill dal canonical (deterministico)' section expandable, info banner contains 'canonical_phonemes'. editor-autofill-request-btn present. Click → editor-autofill-preview appears with all 4 child panels (features/knobs/classification/position). Cancel button hides preview and does NOT mutate form. Apply button hides preview, shows toast 'Autofill applicato: features, knobs, classification, vowelChartPosition · ricontrolla e salva.', and Features section then shows 8 items. Editor reloads cleanly after (no accidental persistence via subsequent Save).
critical_code_review_comments: phoneme_cards.py _compose_autofill_for_vowel: knobs are built in order advancement/tenseness/height/roundness only for vowels where BOTH the field is set AND the term is in the mapping dict; a vowel with an unknown height/backness label (outside the controlled vocabulary) would silently produce a knobs array of <4 items. Currently all 40+ canonical vowels use controlled terms, but if the inventory ever adds a variant term the knob would be dropped without warning — worth a debug log or a fallback 'unknown' bucket.

phoneme_cards.py build_autofill_payload uses HTTPException 400 for both dialect and missing-ipa; the FastAPI Query-parameter default (no default value, no Query(...)) makes ipa/dialect a REQUIRED query string, so empty ipa is caught by FastAPI as a 422 not 400 — the manual `if not ipa: raise 400` is unreachable via the current router signature. Tests accept 400|422; consider using Query(min_length=1) for explicit 400.

PhonemeAdminEditorPage.jsx applyAutofill: uses `prev.features` fallback when autofill features is empty — so a consonant applying to a vowel-shaped card would preserve prev.knobs (since consonant.knobs=[]). This is defensive but silent — worth a small UI hint 'knobs section skipped for consonant'. Not blocking.

PhonemeAdminEditorPage.jsx canonicalDialectFor: hardcodes AmE→GenAm mapping but if a card had dialects=['GenAm'] the includes('AmE') check would miss and fall through to includes('RP')→ 'RP' fallback. Current cards use 'AmE' label so this is fine, but the mapping is fragile if seed labels evolve.

The autofill preview panel does not preview what will be overwritten in the form — it only shows the incoming values. A side-by-side diff of 'current → autofill' would prevent surprise overrides on cards that already have hand-tuned classification/knobs. Enhancement, not a bug.
seed_data_creation: None. Backend tests are read-only; the persistence-guarantee test snapshots u-foot features/knobs before and after autofill and asserts equality. Frontend test applied autofill client-side (state mutation) but never clicked Save, and page was reloaded afterwards. No DB writes performed. Note: pre-existing dialectNote='auto test' visible in screenshot appears to be residue from an unrelated prior session (out of scope for Phase D — main agent may want to restore to canonical value if desired).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase D autofill is stable and preview-only. Reuse /app/backend/tests/test_phoneme_phase_d.py alongside test_phoneme_phase_c.py (8 tests), test_phoneme_phase_b.py (14 tests), test_canonical_phonemes.py (27 tests) — combined 65-test regression suite for the Phoneme CMS + canonical inventory. The autofill endpoint depends on canonical_phonemes seed being fully loaded (84 items); if that seed count drifts, autofill tests for /ʊ/ /iː/ /t/ /ɪə/ will still work but the regression test_canonical_count_84 will flag it. Note: the autosave debounce (30s) means quick admin edits do NOT auto-persist within a typical test session — reloading the editor within 30s of an unsaved change wipes the change safely.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found. All 15 spec items verified: (1) /ʊ/ GenAm vowel blob complete, (2) /iː/ RP FLEECE, (3) /t/ GenAm consonant with flapping note, (4) /ɪə/ RP diphthong, (5) /ɪə/ GenAm 404, (6) unknown IPA 404 with 'non presente', (7) invalid dialect 400 with 'GenAm o RP', (8) missing ipa 422, (9) no-auth 403, (10) preview-only zero DB writes, (11-14) editor UI cancel/apply/toast/preview panels, (15) Phase A/B/C regression (84 canonical, 9-bar chart). Two initial pytest failures were in my own test code: (a) dialect_notes shape assumption (str vs dict) — canonical uses dict {GenAm: 'flapped...', RP: '...'}, fixed to stringify before .lower(); (b) canonical response shape ({count,items,controlled_vocabulary}) vs assumed list — fixed to unwrap data['items']. Both fixes tightened the tests without loosening assertions.
